# llms.txt - AI Crawler Indexing
# Specification: https://llmstxt.fyi/

Welcome to Pliny
================

Pliny is a prepaid electricity usage tracker for Indonesian households.
Track your electricity credit usage, monitor appliance wattage,
and estimate remaining balance.

Target Audience:
- Indonesian households using prepaid (token) electricity
- Users who want to track and optimize their electricity consumption

Key Features:
- Log electricity top-ups (token purchases with kWh amount)
- Record meter readings (meter number input)
- Track per-appliance electricity consumption (wattage & hours)
- Monitor daily usage patterns
- Calculate estimated balance remaining
- Dark mode support

Technical Stack:
- Svelte 5 with runes
- SvelteKit with Cloudflare Pages adapter
- TypeScript
- UnoCSS (atomic CSS)
- bits-ui components (accessibility primitives)
- Zod for validation

Repository:
https://github.com/sepagian/pliny

Demo:
https://pliny.sepagian.xyz

---
SECTIONS

/home - Dasbor - Main dashboard showing current balance and usage statistics
/appliance - Perangkat - Manage and add electronic devices to track

---
API REFERENCE

No public API. Data is stored locally in the browser (localStorage).

---
CONTENT

All content is in Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia).
